title: Causal Relationship Identification
scenario: Create a prompt to identify potential causal relationships between variables using regression analysis. The prompt should include a dataset and the desired output format. The target output should be a statistical analysis using LaTeX.
constraints: Must include a regression analysis with a specific R-squared value

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the regression analysis accurately represents the causal relationships.
Check if the LaTeX code is syntactically valid.
Evaluate the LaTeX code's readability and adherence to statistical conventions.
